name: aether-ai
description: An extension that provides model support for GitHub Copilot Chat, including ZhipuAI, MiniMax, MoonshotAI, DeepSeek, Alibaba Cloud Bailian, and custom OpenAI/Anthropic compatible models.

commands.title: ZhipuAI Configuration Wizard (API Key & Search MCP Mode)
Configure MiniMax Coding Plan Dedicated Key
Insert Handle Reference with Full Path

aether.selectedModel.description: Currently selected model in provider::model format (e.g. 'apertis::gpt-4o'). Set automatically when you pick a model via the status bar.

aether.temperature.description: Controls the randomness of AI model output. Lower values (like 0.1) produce more deterministic output, while higher values (like 1.0) produce more creative output.

aether.topP.description: Controls the diversity of AI model output. Using smaller values (like 0.9) reduces output randomness.

aether.maxTokens.description: Controls the maximum number of tokens in AI model output. Larger values allow longer responses.

aether.rememberLastModel.description: When enabled, records and automatically restores the last used extension-provided model. (VSCode 1.106.0 will reset to default optimal model [e.g., Claude Sonnet 4.5])

aether.hideThinkingInUI.description: Completely hide model thinking/reasoning output in chat UI across all providers.

aether.zhipu.search.enableMCP.description: Enable ZhipuAI search MCP SDK mode. Uses standard MCP protocol and official SDK for search functionality, providing more stable connections and better error handling. Non-subscription plans should disable this switch to use standard billing interface (per-request billing). Requires valid ZhipuAI API key.

aether.zhipu.endpoint.description: ZhipuAI access site. open.bigmodel.cn is domestic site (recommended), api.z.ai is international site.

aether.zhipu.plan.description: ZhipuAI plan type. coding: use /api/coding/paas/v4 endpoint (GLM Coding Plan), normal: use /api/paas/v4 endpoint (standard billing).

aether.zhipu.thinking.description: ZhipuAI thinking mode (GLM-4.5+). enabled: always use thinking, disabled: never use thinking, auto: let model decide.

aether.zhipu.clearThinking.description: ZhipuAI thinking context handling. true: clear prior reasoning_content from next-turn context (recommended). false: preserve prior reasoning_content in context.

aether.minimax.endpoint.description: MiniMax Coding Plan access site. minimaxi.com is domestic site (recommended), minimax.io is international site.

aether.fimCompletion.enabled.description: Enable FIM (Fill In the Middle) suggestion feature.

model.description: Model name used for FIM completion

maxTokens.description: Maximum length returned by FIM completion

extraBody.description: Additional request body parameters, merged into the request body

aether.nesCompletion.enabled.description: Enable NES (Next Edit Suggestions) suggestion feature.

aether.nesCompletion.manualOnly.description: When enabled, NES completion only responds to manual triggers (Alt+/), will not trigger automatically.

model.description: Model name used for NES completion

maxTokens.description: Maximum length returned by NES completion

extraBody.description: Additional request body parameters, will be merged into request body in API requests

aether.providerOverrides.description: Provider configuration overrides. Supports SDK mode, custom headers, and model-level overrides including custom models.

aether.compatibleModels.description: Custom model configuration for Compatible Provider. Completely user-configured OpenAI/Anthropic compatible model list.

aether.moonshot.plan.description: MoonshotAI plan type. coding: use https://api.kimi.com/coding/v1, normal: use https://api.moonshot.ai/v1.

aether.aihubmix.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for AIHubMix.

aether.apertis.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for Apertis AI.

aether.blackbox.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for Blackbox AI.

aether.clarifai.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for Clarifai.

aether.commonstack.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for CommonStack.

aether.dashscope.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for DashScope (Ali Bailian).

aether.deepseek.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for DeepSeek.

aether.dialagram.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for Dialagram.

aether.fastrouter.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for FastRouter.

aether.fireworks.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for Fireworks AI.

aether.jiekou.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for Jiekou AI.

aether.llmgateway.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for LLMGateway.

aether.minimax.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for MiniMax.

aether.modelark.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for ModelArk (BytePlus).

aether.modelscope.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for ModelScope.

aether.ollama.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for Ollama.

aether.opencode.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for OpenCode.

aether.opencodego.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for OpenCode Zen Go.

aether.portkey.sdkMode.description: Select SDK compatibility mode for Portkey.

aether.mcpBridge.http.port.description: Port for the MCP HTTP server

aether.mcpBridge.http.enabled.description: Enable MCP HTTP server on startup

aether.mcpBridge.logging.logInvocations.description: Log tool invocations to output channel

aether.mcpBridge.tools.include.description: Glob patterns for tools to include

aether.mcpBridge.tools.exclude.description: Glob patterns for tools to exclude

aether.mcpBridge.extensions.include.description: Glob patterns for extensions to include

aether.mcpBridge.extensions.exclude.description: Glob patterns for extensions to exclude

aether.mcpBridge.polling.intervalMs.description: Polling interval for tool registry in milliseconds

languageModelChatProviders.displayName: ⦿ OpenAI Codex (OpenAI Codex specialized coding provider)
⦿ Hugging Face (Hugging Face Router endpoint integration)
⦿ Knox (Knox Chat - OpenAI SDK compatible endpoint)
⦿ LLMGateway (Unified access to multiple AI models)
⦿ MiniMax (MiniMax family models with coding endpoint options)
⦿ NVIDIA NIM (NVIDIA NIM hosted model endpoints)
⦿ OpenCode Zen Go (OpenCode Zen Go endpoint integration)
⦿ Pollinations AI (Pollinations AI - OpenAI-compatible API with diverse model selection)
⦿ Puter AI (Free AI API - access 500+ models including GPT, Claude, Gemini with Puter auth token)
⦿ Seraphyn (Seraphyn AI - OpenAI SDK compatible endpoint)
⦿ Vercel AI (Vercel AI Gateway endpoint integration)
⦿ Zhipu AI (GLM family models and coding plan features)

languageModelTools.name: aether_zhipuWebSearch
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Uses ZhipuAI's web search functionality to get real-time information. Supports multiple search engines: search_std (standard search, ¥0.01), search_pro (advanced search, ¥0.03), search_pro_sogou (Sogou search, ¥0.05), search_pro_quark (Quark search, ¥0.05). Note: Pro+ plans can use MCP SSE calls, non-subscription plans use standard billing interface (per-request billing).
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get latest information through ZhipuAI web search

search_engine.description: Search engine type: search_std (standard, ¥0.01), search_pro (advanced, ¥0.03), search_pro_sogou (Sogou, ¥0.05), search_pro_quark (Quark, ¥0.05)

search_intent.description: Whether to perform search intent analysis

count.description: Number of search results to return

search_domain_filter.description: Domain filter, limits search to specific websites

search_recency_filter.description: Time filter: noLimit (no limit), day (within one day), week (within one week), month (within one month), year (within one year)

content_size.description: Content detail level: low (low), medium (medium), high (high)

languageModelTools.name: aether_minimaxWebSearch
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Uses MiniMax Coding Plan's web search functionality to get real-time information. Requires subscribing to MiniMax Coding Plan and setting dedicated API key.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get latest information through MiniMax web search

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run clean && npm run compile
